flags: HIGH wheel spin (17.17 rad/s mean) -- possible wheel-momentum exploit: robot spins wheels to stay upright rather than holding posture
XY drift (3.26 m max from start) -- robot rolling or drifting while appearing balanced; position_drift reward may be insufficient
CHRONIC ROLL (5.2 deg mean |roll|) -- robot leaning sideways: visually bad even if below 46 deg termination
CONTROL JITTER (11.552 Nm mean step-to-step change) -- chattering actuation: action_rate penalty may be too weak
LEG ASYMMETRY (0.132 rad mean hip_pitch+knee diff) -- one leg crouched more than the other; symmetry reward may be too weak
TORSO WOBBLE (ang_vel RMS=0.82 rad/s) -- chronic pitch/roll oscillation below termination threshold
